basic_details.job_title: SVNIT Deputy Director Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: SARDAR VALLABHBHAI NATIONAL INSTITUTE OF TECHNOLOGY, SURAT (SVNIT)
basic_details.short_information: The Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology, Surat (SVNIT) has officially announced the Deputy Director Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification has been published on the official website https://www.svnit.ac.in. Candidates not exceeding 60 years of age who are Professors with a minimum of 5 years of experience, including at least 2 years as HoD/Dean, along with significant contributions in academics, administration, and outreach activities and an outstanding academic record, can submit their offline applications until 22 July 2026. Direct links to download the of

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Not exceeding 60 years of age at the time of applying.
age_limit.details: Maximum Age: Not exceeding 60 years of age at the time of applying.

qualification.education_qualification: Professor with minimum 5 years of experience and at least 2 years as HoD/Dean. Should have sufficient contribution in academics, administration and outreach activities and an outstanding academic record.
qualification.details: Deputy Director: Professor with minimum 5 years of experience. Should have at least 2 years as HoD/Dean. Must have sufficient contribution in academics, administration, and outreach activities. Should be an eminent person in their field of specialization with an outstanding academic record.

selection_process: Selection Committee as per provisions under Statutes 23(5) (a) of the respective Statutes.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for SVNIT Deputy Director Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 22-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: SVNIT Deputy Director Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the SVNIT Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download SVNIT Deputy Director Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: SVNIT Deputy Director Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Deputy Director: Professor with minimum 5 years of experience. Should have at least 2 years as HoD/Dean. Must have sufficient contribution in academics, administration, and outreach activities. Should be an eminent person in their field of specialization with an outstanding academic record.

content_sections.heading: SVNIT Deputy Director Application Fee 2026
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: SVNIT Deputy Director Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: Not exceeding 60 years of age at the time of applying.

content_sections.heading: SVNIT Deputy Director Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Selection Committee as per provisions under Statutes 23(5) (a) of the respective Statutes.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for SVNIT Deputy Director Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 22-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: SVNIT Deputy Director Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the SVNIT Deputy Director position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Deputy Director post at SVNIT, Surat is 22nd July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the eligibility criteria for the Deputy Director post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be Professors with a minimum of 5 years of experience, including at least 2 years as HoD/Dean, and possess an outstanding academic record with significant contributions to academics, administration, and outreach.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 60 years as of the application deadline.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the Deputy Director position?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline in the prescribed format, along with necessary enclosures, to the Registrar Office by the last date.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this post?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any specific application fee for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for the Deputy Director role?
faq.answer: The job type for the Deputy Director position is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q7. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by SARDAR VALLABHBHAI NATIONAL INSTITUTE OF TECHNOLOGY, SURAT (SVNIT).

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is E/611.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Deputy Director post?
faq.answer: The selection will be made by a Selection Committee as per the provisions under Statutes 23(5) (a) of the respective Statutes.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the links provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.
